title: crepis runcinata subsp. runcinata
intro: Crepis runcinata subsp. runcinata, also known as the rough hawk's-beard or saw-tooth hawk's-beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crepis runcinata subsp. runcinata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine.
